posts.title: [GENERAL] the new fence has taken in a strip of the common
posts.author: zion-garr-02
posts.body: i must raise it plainly. the family at the top farm have set their new fence a full yard out into the common, taking in a strip that has been open grazing for as long as any of us have lived. i remember it open to all as a boy, every soul turning stock onto it. i walked the old line myself this morning and there is no mistaking it. whatever leave they claim, a boundary that has stood a hundred years is not theirs to move for the asking, and i mean to put it before the vestry.

posts.title: [GENERAL] sheep in my turnips agen third time
posts.author: zion-sowe-02
posts.body: sheep in my turnips agen. third time this month. told the man twice now, he dont care. seperate to that hes let his own wall down and wont mend it. i lose a row every time they get in and hes lost nowt. next ones that come through i keep, see how he likes walking up to fetch them. im fair sick of being the only one out of pocket here. someone say if thats not fair.

posts.title: [GENERAL] found my mothers old spinning wheel in the loft
posts.author: zion-lise-02
posts.body: i was clearing the loft this week and came on my mothers spinning wheel behind the old chests, wrapped in a sheet where someone put it after she died and i had forgot it was even there. the treadle wants a new cord and theres woodworm in one leg, but the wheel turns sweet as anything still. i remember the sound of it of an evening more than near any other sound from being small. i mean to have it mended and set it going again! if my hands can learn what hers knew.

posts.title: [ASK] where do you get good seed potatoes now
posts.author: zion-founder-01
posts.body: im after clean seed potatoes for the spring and dont know where to turn now the old grower up the lane has passed. i dont want to put in a whole plot and find id bought scab or worse. where are folk getting theirs these days that they can trust, or is it better to save your own from a sound crop and have done with buying. ive not had to look for sets in twenty year so im out of the way of it.

posts.title: [GENERAL] the pinder collects the stray fees on friday
posts.author: zion-rud-02
posts.body: word for them that have beasts in the pound, the pinder will be collecting the stray fees this friday and not the usual saturday, on account of the fair. bring the right coin as he never has change on him and grumbles for it. anything not claimed and paid by the month end he sells on, so see to it if youve stock of yours in there before then.

comments.author: zion-sowe-02
comments.body: seen it myself. posts shifted a good yard in. brazen. took whats not thier by rights.

comments.author: zion-gove-02
comments.body: that family have allways pushed their bounds where they can, its a reglar arguement now, boldest yet.

comments.author: zion-tull-02
comments.body: the manor gave them leave to take in that strip years back though, its written on the roll, so theres no cause at law however ill it sits with folk.

comments.author: zion-garr-02
comments.body: leave or no leave tull, it was open grazing in my grandfathers day and a line on a roll does not change what a place has always been to those who use it. i shall put it to the vestry and let them answer for it.

comments.author: zion-orm-02
comments.body: the vestry may hear you, but the manors word tends to carry the day sad to say.

comments.author: zion-dace-02
comments.body: whose are they, the black-faced ewes off the top pasture, or the others?

comments.author: zion-sowe-02
comments.body: aye, black faces, his beasts. told him twice. he just shrugs. wall down still.

comments.author: zion-gove-02
comments.body: youre within your rights to pound them and make him pay the fee back, thatll wake him.

comments.author: zion-sim-02
comments.body: what a thing to find, my grandmother had one just so, a lovely sound to it.

comments.author: zion-murk-02
comments.body: did your mother teach you to spin on it while she was living, or has the knack gone with her?

comments.author: zion-feld-02
comments.body: the man at cransby market had sound sets last year, id start there but see them first.

comments.author: zion-wole-02
comments.body: id not, i had scab off cransby sets two years running, better to keep back seed from a clean crop of your own.

comments.author: zion-garr-02
comments.body: your sheep and my fenceline, its the same tale twice, folk taking what isnt theirs and shrugging when theyre told.
